alternative_parents.description: Compounds having the general structure RN=CR2 (where R is not a hydrogen atom).
alternative_parents.name: Azomethines

alternative_parents.description: Organic 1,3-dipolar compounds with the general structure  X#N+-Z- <-> X-=N+=Z <-> X-=N-Z+ <-> X-N=Z (X = C or O, Z = C, N, or O).
alternative_parents.name: Propargyl-type 1,3-dipolar organic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a bond between carbon a pnictogen atom. Pnictogens are p-block element atoms that are in the group 15 of the periodic table.
alternative_parents.name: Organopnictogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
class.name: Organonitrogen compounds

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as secondary ketimines. These are ketimines where the nitrogen of the ketimine group is linked to an alkyl or aryl group.

direct_parent.description: Ketimines where the nitrogen of the ketimine group is linked to an alkyl or aryl group.
direct_parent.name: Secondary ketimines

intermediate_nodes.description: Organic compounds bearing the ketimine functional group, with the general structure R2C=NR' ( R is not a hydrogen ).
intermediate_nodes.name: Ketimines

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Compounds containing an imine functional group, with the general structure RN=CR2 (R = H, hydrocarbyl).
subclass.name: Imines

superclass.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
superclass.name: Organic nitrogen compounds
